---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief one-line description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why do you need this?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or references to similar features in other tools.

---

> **Note:** Check the [Roadmap](../../blob/main/README.md#roadmap) first.
> Features already on the roadmap don't need a request — just a 👍 reaction.
